zh.lifeSummary: 當Willam Jackson於1498年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林時，他的父親William Jackson28歲，母親Elizabeth Jackson22歲。他於1518年與Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年5月在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍爾布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Willam Jackson于1498年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林时，他的父亲William Jackson28岁，母亲Elizabeth Jackson22岁。他于1518年与Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年5月在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾霍爾布林。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: Willam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Willam Jackson was born in 1498, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Jackson, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Jackson, was 22. He married Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth in 1518, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in May 1549, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Willam Jackson est né en 1498, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Jackson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jackson, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth en 1518, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1549, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Willam Jackson 1498 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Jackson 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Jackson 22. Er hat 1518 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1549 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Willam Jackson è nato il nel 1498 nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Jackson, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Jackson, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth nel 1518, nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1549, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Horbling, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Willam Jacksonが1498年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングで生まれた時，父William Jacksonは28歳，母Elizabeth Jacksonは22歳であった。1518年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングでAnne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年5月に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Willam Jackson(이)가 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Jackson(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Jackson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 5월 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 호르블링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Willam Jackson nasceu em 1498, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Jackson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Jackson, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth em 1518, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1549, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Willam Jackson родился в 1498 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Jackson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jackson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth в 1518 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер май 1549 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Willam Jackson nació en 1498, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Jackson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Jackson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth en 1518, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1549, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
